Description.DefaultValue:
Attacks 1 enemy 1 time
Places Increase SPD II (30%) on self for 2 turns if the attack was critical
Places Increase CrCh II (30%) on self if this attack wasn't critical

Attack: single target, 3 hits

Deals an additional hit for each buff or debuff on the target. Maximum of 3 bonus hits. 
If all 6 attacks were made, places on target Burn for 2 turns and Fear II for 1 turn

Places on self Increase DEF 60% for 3 turns

Places on all enemies Fear I for 1 turn If target is under Block damage buff, places on that target Fear II for 1 turn If target has Shield buff, places Decrease SPD 30% for 2 turns. The debuffs are unresistable
Takes 15% less damage from Legendary Champions
